meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Founders: Passive Income to Solve Project Abandonment
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to generate passive income as a founder using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led, beginner-friendly checklist.
content.answer_block: You finish projects by shifting from 'crafting' to 'shipping.' By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative execution, you reduce friction to near-zero. Passive income flows when you build small, automated SaaS micro-tools that solve high-intent problems, allowing you to monetize while you sleep.
content.intro:
The graveyard of unfinished SaaS projects is littered with brilliant ideas that died on the vine of perfectionism. You know the feeling: the initial spark of genius fades into the cold reality of scope creep, technical debt, and the crushing realization that you aren't moving the needle toward revenue.

But what if you stopped building 'products' and started building 'assets'? By adopting an AI-first workflow, you bypass the burnout phase. We are going to turn your development process into a high-speed engine, using modern AI tooling to ensure that every hour you invest is directly tied to a deployable, revenue-generating feature.

steps.title: Validate via Micro-SaaS Niche
steps.description: Don't build for everyone. Identify a specific, painful problem in a niche market where users are already paying for sub-optimal solutions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this niche [INSERT NICHE] and identify three high-intent micro-SaaS problems that can be solved with a single-page AI workflow. Prioritize high-frequency, low-maintenance solutions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Create a market analysis report for [NICHE] focusing on underserved SaaS needs.'

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Core
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate your boilerplate. Never write authentication or database schema from scratch again.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js boilerplate with Supabase auth, Stripe integration, and Tailwind CSS. Focus on a clean, modular architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Initialize project structure based on Antigravity boilerplate specs.'

steps.title: Automate Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Directly instruct the AI to build the core business logic. Focus on the 'value-add' layer of your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for [CORE FEATURE] that processes user input and returns a structured JSON response suitable for an API endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Implement the core business logic for the service layer and add unit tests.'

steps.title: Integrate Passive Monetization
steps.description: Implement Stripe billing early. If the feature doesn't have a paywall, it's not a business; it's a hobby.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe checkout session handler and a webhook listener to update user subscription status in Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Setup Stripe checkout integration and secure API routes with middleware.'

steps.title: Automated Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your repo to Vercel/Railway for instant deployment. Shipping is the final step of the development cycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Vercel configuration file that optimizes build times and environment variable management for production.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'How do I deploy this to Vercel using the CLI with optimal performance settings?'

pro_tips: Treat your code as disposable; if a feature takes more than 48 hours to build, you are over-engineering.
Always build the payment gateway before the landing page; if you can't charge, you haven't built a product.
Use Claude Code to write your documentation as you code—this forces you to simplify the implementation.
Leverage existing APIs rather than building custom backends whenever possible to keep maintenance costs at zero.
Schedule your 'shipping' for Tuesday mornings to capture maximum early-adopter traffic.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on distribution and only 20% on feature development. Track your conversion rates and iterate only when data suggests a clear path to higher MRR.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming of the perfect app and start collecting recurring revenue from your first micro-SaaS. You have the tools, the strategy, and the blueprint. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
